items.caption: It’s easy to start hosting and earn extra income.

name.localizedString: Spacious, Stylish, Higher Floor 3bhk Apt near BKC

summary.localizedString: This Stylish and Spacious 3bhk apartment is perfect for Group/Family trips and Get Togethers. Located in a quiet neighborhood in the heart of BKC, it is perfect for people visiting for events (Jio World or MMRDA) / work purposes or Visa services (VFS) in BKC. It’s also close to Siddhivinayak Temple and Shopping Areas like Linking Road and Santacruz.
